file_insights.changes_summary: Integrated new render system; replaced imperative print logic with declarative CardView collection and render_board invocation
key_structural_changes: Added: collect_card_groups() to organize (label, Vec<CardView>) tuples by state and team
Added: collect_card_views() to map bop_core::read_meta to render::CardView
Added: stats_to_render_stats() bridge from CardStats to render::Stats
Refactored: list_cards() now 5-liner: detect caps, collect groups, stats, render, print
Refactored: list_cards_watch() now re-detects TermCaps on every redraw, uses watch lock singleton
file_insights.legacy_compatibility: print_state_group(), print_summary(), format_duration() marked #[allow(dead_code)] — preserved for tests, fallback usage

patterns_discovered.name: Render System Abstraction
patterns_discovered.description: Separation of concerns: card collection (collect_card_views) → grouping (collect_card_groups) → rendering (render::render_board)
patterns_discovered.benefit: UI changes isolated from list.rs; future terminal output styles require only render module updates

patterns_discovered.name: Terminal Capability Re-detection
patterns_discovered.description: TermCaps::detect() called on every redraw in watch mode, never cached
patterns_discovered.rationale: Terminal width/colors can change mid-session (resize, mode switches); matches spec requirement for real-time adaptation

patterns_discovered.name: Singleton Watch Lock Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: lock::acquire_watch_lock(root) guard held for function lifetime; prevents concurrent watch instances via mkdir-atomicity
patterns_discovered.analogy: Matches dispatcher's atomic locking; reusable for other long-lived watchers

patterns_discovered.name: Composite Group Labels for Teams
patterns_discovered.description: Team-scoped cards grouped as 'team-name/state' instead of separate state groups
patterns_discovered.implication: Organizes output hierarchically without nested data structures; simplifies render layer

patterns_discovered.name: Line Counting Simplification
patterns_discovered.description: Replaced size-computation logic with post-render line count: output.lines().count()
patterns_discovered.tradeoff: Accurate (matches actual display), O(n) string iteration instead of O(1) prediction

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Team group label format changed from (state, team_prefix) to single 'team/state' string
gotchas_discovered.impact: Render layer must handle composite labels; consumers expecting separate dimensions need updates
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Render module parses/displays label directly; list.rs formats once

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Line counting now depends on actual rendered output, not pre-computed card counts
gotchas_discovered.risk: Cursor-up positioning for watch redraw will fail if render output contains unexpected newlines (e.g., wrapping, errors)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: render::render_board must guarantee predictable line output; test with wrapped card titles

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Watch lock is acquired silently; if acquisition fails, watcher silently drops
gotchas_discovered.severity: Low - stderr printed, non-fatal error; watch simply won't start, user sees error
gotchas_discovered.design_choice: map_err followed by early return is intentional (prefer no watch to duplicate watches)

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Legacy functions (print_state_group, print_summary, format_duration) still present but marked dead_code
gotchas_discovered.cleanup_requirement: Remove after confirming all tests and manual usage switched to render system; currently used by tests

requirements_met: ✓ TermCaps::detect() re-called on every watch redraw (no caching)
✓ collect_card_views(dir, state) converts bop_core::read_meta to render::CardView
✓ collect_card_groups() produces (label, Vec<CardView>) tuples grouped by state and team
✓ render::render_board(caps, groups, stats) produces full output string
✓ Output string printed directly (no intermediate print functions)
✓ calculate_stats() preserved and updated for new stats struct
✓ Existing tests still pass (legacy functions marked dead_code, not removed)
outcome_details.code_quality: Clean, readable, 5-line list_cards() vs 50+ line old version
outcome_details.watch_mode_integrity: Clock header + watch lock + TermCaps re-detection + accurate line counting all working

recommendations.action: Test watch mode redraw cursor positioning under various terminal widths (40, 80, 120+ cols) and card title wrapping scenarios
recommendations.rationale: Line counting relies on render output accuracy; wrapping or unexpected newlines will break cursor-up positioning

recommendations.action: Document watch lock pattern (lock.rs) as reusable singleton guard for other long-lived file watchers
recommendations.rationale: Prevents accidental concurrent watch instances; applies to future dashboard, lane-metrics, other monitors

recommendations.action: Merge render::Stats and CardStats into single struct or ensure bidirectional conversion is exhaustive
recommendations.rationale: Current stats_to_render_stats() bridge is manual copy; reduces maintenance burden if consolidated

recommendations.action: Schedule removal of print_state_group(), print_summary(), format_duration() after 2-3 release cycles
recommendations.rationale: Legacy fallbacks no longer needed once all callers confirmed migrated; reduces codebase noise

recommendations.action: Add integration test: list_cards_watch with mock card events to verify redraw line counts match output
recommendations.rationale: Proactive detection of cursor positioning regressions; especially important for multiline card titles
